get.summary: Get unread messages in conversation count.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching unread messages in conversation count in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user whose unread messages count in a conversation to be fetched.

parameters.name: converationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation whose unread messages count are to be fetched.

get.description: Get unread messages in conversation count in a project in an account.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching unread messages in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching unread messages in a conversation.

parameters.name: converationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation whose unread messages are to be fetched.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of messages to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of messages to be skipped before fetching messages(used for paging).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specifies the sorting criteria for the returned results.Allowed values are 1 and -1.Default is descending order, -1

get.description: Get unread messages in conversation in a project in an account.

put.summary: Mark messages sent before a timestamp as read in a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used to mark messages sent before a timestamp as read in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is marking the messages sent before a timestamp as read.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body parameters for marking messages sent before a timestamp as read in a conversation.

User.title: Message sender details

userProfileImageUrl.description: Profilepic associated with the message sender.

userName.description: Name associated with the message sender.

userIdentifier.description: Identifier associated with the message sender.

userId.description: Id associated with the message sender.

online.description: Whether message sender is online now.

metaData.description: Object containing metadata of the message sender, if any.

lastSeen.description: Epoch time at which message sender was last seen online.Value is -1 incase user is online now

User.description: Model containing details of the message sender.

Message.title: Unread message details

updatedAt.description: Epoch time at which message was last updated at.

showInConversation.description: Whether the message needs to be show in conversation.

sentAt.description: Epoch time at which message was sent at.

senderId.description: Id of the user who sent message.

reactions.description: Object containing info of rections added for the message.

parentMessageId.description: Id of the message for which to send reply(Mandatory for reply messages).

metaData.description: Additional information of the message that you can save like tags etc, if any.

deliveryReadEventsEnabled.description: Whether message delivery/read events are enabled or not for conversation.

conversationId.description: Id of the conversation in which message was sent.

Message.description: Model containing details of the unread message fetched.

MentionedUsers.description: All mentioned users for a message.

userProfileImageUrl.description: Profilepic associated with the mentioned user.

userName.description: Name associated with the mentioned user.

userIdentifier.description: Identifier associated with the mentioned user.

order.description: Mention user's order in the message in reference to another mentioned user.

online.description: Whether mentioned user is online now.

metaData.description: Object containing metadata of the mentioned user, if any.

lastSeen.description: Epoch time at which mentioned user was last seen online.Value is -1 incase user is online now

MentionedUser.description: Model containing details of the mentioned user.

Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.title: Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversation_count

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.description: errorCode- 0 => licenseKey not found, 1 => Unread messages not found.

Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.title: Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_404_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.description: errorCode- 0 => licenseKey not found, 1 => Unread messages not found.

Error_404_fetch_unread_conversations_cou.title: Error_404_fetch_unread_conversations_count

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_404_fetch_unread_conversations_cou.description: errorCode- 0 => licenseKey not found, 1 => Unread conversations not found.

Error_403_unread_messages.title: Error_403_unread_messages

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_unread_messages.description: errorCode- 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_403_mark_messages_as_read.title: Error_403_mark_messages_as_read

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_mark_messages_as_read.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 2 => Read events disabled for conversation, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_403_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.title: Error_403_fetch_unread_messages_conversation

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_400_mark_messages_as_read.title: Error_400_mark_messages_as_read

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_mark_messages_as_read.description: Conversation not found or not allowed to mark messages as read.

Error_400_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.title: Error_400_fetch_unread_messages_conversation_count

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_400_fetch_unread_messages_conversa.description: Conversation not found or not allowed to fetch unread messages count.

Attachment.title: Attachment details
